name: Bone Pile

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Fused Joints
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model resolves an action, it may remove a Remains marker within 2" to heal 2.

actions.name: Sharp Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Pick the Bones
triggers.text: After killing, this model may declare the Interact action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: Bone Javelin
actions.effects: This action deals +1 damage if the target is at a lower elevation.

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

actions.name: Throw 'Em a Bone
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only. If this model is at elevation 2 or higher, increase this action's Rg by +6".
actions.effects: Target heals 1 and may remove a token.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 based on 'Minion (3)' characteristic
